name: ASRock Z790 TAICHI CARRARA E-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - 2x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - Support DDR5-6600+(OC) - 5x M.2 Slots - 2x USB4 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - Killer 2.5G LAN - Intel GbE LAN - Killer 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6E - ESS SABRE9218 DAC
